title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Daenerys arrives at Vaes Dothrak, while Sam and Gilly sail for Horn Hill. Later, Varys finds information on the Sons of the Harpy.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Sansa arrives at Castle Black, while Tyrion makes a deal with the slave masters. Later, Jorah and Daario sneak into Vaes Dothrak.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie is back with Aidan but gets a call from Big. Meanwhile, Charlotte wants to quit her gallery job and interviews potential successors.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie finally gives her house key to Aidan. However, he still feels kept out of her life when she refuses to accept a new laptop from him after hers broke down mysteriously.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: When Miranda learns Steve has testicular cancer, she urges him to take it seriously. Meanwhile, Samantha becomes agitated every time a date asks about her plans for the weekend.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Mr Big's beautiful movie star girlfriend breaks up with him. Subsequently, he immediately comes to visit Carrie at Aidan's cabin.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Monica painfully struggles to deal with her new boss. Meanwhile, Richard makes an important decision about the company's future.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard desperately struggles to find a backer as they face legal and financial woes. Meanwhile, an old enemy visits Richard.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: While considering Gavin's proposal, Richard is approached by Russ Hanneman, an image-conscious billionaire who wants to back Pied Piper. Gilfoyle and Dinesh play hardball to get what they want. Gavin finds a new strategy in dealing with the enemy.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard and Erlich disagree over a potential employee. Dinesh and Gilfoyle worry that someone they recommended for the company will be receiving more money than they make.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Gavin's interference causes Pied Piper to struggle with securing its expansion.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: When Monica encourages the guys to pounce on an opportunity, Erlich reconnects with his old billionaire mentor, Double-A... but Richard finds out their friendship isn't quite what Erlich thinks it is. Meanwhile, Jared encourages a friendship between Carla and Monica.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Since Pied Piper is the official company name, Erlich wants a logotype and hires an artist for the job. Meanwhile, Richard faces a tighter deadline for the project after a mistake.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard discovers a problem in the code writing and hires Kevin to write the code for him.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard has trouble getting Pied Piper ready in time for the TechCrunch Disrupt. Meanwhile, Erlich realises he slept with the wife of one of the judges of the contest.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Pied Piper makes it to the next stage of Disrupt but runs into trouble with Hooli's presentation. Meanwhile, Richard tries to pull the company together before the big presentation.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda is pregnant after spending a single night with Steve. Furthermore, after she tells her friends of her intention to abort, Charlotte walks out envious and disgusted.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Aidan proposes they buy Carrie's apartment together. Later, she finds a ring among his belongings and accidentally insults Miranda, who helped pick it out.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie finds living together with Aidan cramps their space. Meanwhile, Trey is ready to get on with life without a baby.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: The girls spend a night at the club Trade, dancing in a sea of attractive men. Additionally, Carrie meets Australian shoe importer Oliver Spencer, much to Stanford's envy.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Val's ambitious new publicist persistently pressures her to get a glamorous picture on the star-studded red carpet with Juna.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Jane pulls rank on Tom and Paulie G to get Valerie more lines on Room and Bored. Meanwhile, a stalker threat forces extra security on set, exposing old back problems.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Faded television starlet Valerie Cherish attempts to land a role in a new sitcom, Room and Bored, by taking part in a reality show chronicling her somewhat mortifying comeback.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Valerie discovers that Paulie has written a new HBO show based on his experiences working with her on Room and Bored. Angry, she goes to confront him, only to be cast in the role herself.

title: Elementary
subTitle: Holmes and Watson look for the gunman who invaded Gregson's home before he strikes again; the team gets insight into Gregson's life.

title: Elementary
subTitle: Mycroft comes to New York and asks Sherlock and Watson to assist with a case involving his former fiancee; Sherlock struggles with Watson and Mycroft's relationship.

subTitle: Nine noble families wage war against each other in order to gain control over the mythical land of Westeros. Meanwhile, a force is rising after millenniums and threatens the existence of living men.

subTitle: As shooting for 'Seeing Red' reaches its conclusion, Valerie faces the prospect of working with a different director, an interview with a journalist from The New York Times and several other problems.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard finds himself in an unfortunate web of lies, while Jared plans his exit. Furthermore, Gavin plots a major comeback.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The pressure to succeed forces Richard to grow the company in an unexpected way. Meanwhile, Dinesh and Gilfoyle question their ability to make sound choices.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard manages several conflicts in his efforts to unite his new employees. Later, Dinesh celebrates a new purchase that Gilfoyle attempts to spoil, while Jian-Yang goes to court.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Panicked by suddenly leading a much larger team, Richard finds himself managing a number of small conflicts in his efforts to unite his new employees. Jian-Yang goes to court, and Gavin is met with pushback over his signature and what it says about him.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Attempting to woo a gaming company to PiperNet, Richard inadvertently angers a prized ally. Dinesh deals with a betrayal. In preparation for a big launch, Gavin leaves his underlings with a cryptic message. Jared gets inside information from Big Head.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard's confidence wavers when Laurie and Monica force him to work with Eklow, a new artificial-intelligence company. Meanwhile, Gavin questions his future beyond Hooli.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard decides to help Laurie when she is in trouble, but his lack of emotional discipline threatens to backfire on Pied Piper. Meanwhile, Gavin tries to make a deal with a stubborn partner.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: As Pied Piper prepares to close on their Series B funding, Richard receives some unsettling news. Meanwhile, Gilfoyle suggests a proposition and Monica is blunt with Richard.

title: Veep
subTitle: As Thanksgiving arrives, a new crisis hits the team, with Selina left unable to fulfill her duties. Meanwhile, Dan takes on a new role and Jonah receives exciting news.

title: Veep
subTitle: As the country faces a massive financial crisis, Selina must make an important decision. Meanwhile, Jonah campaigns in New Hampshire and Amy is asked to find the source of comments made about Selina.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina's plan to lobby votes at the annual White House Congressional Ball goes awry. Meanwhile, Dan tries to save Jonah's disastrous campaign.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina takes Catherine to Camp David, ostensibly for a family Christmas celebration, but also to conduct secret talks with the Chinese government. Meanwhile, Amy and Dan try to help Jonah.

title: Veep
subTitle: As Catherine Eaton's documentary approaches its conclusion, Congress makes decisions regarding who will become President.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina and her staff get ready for inauguration day. Mike suffers exhaustion, and Catherine gets a makeover.

title: Veep
subTitle: One year after losing the presidency, Selina attempts to secure her legacy and Dan tries to ingratiate himself at his job. Meanwhile, Amy's brash personality proves too much for her new co-workers.

title: Veep
subTitle: A visit to former President Hughes' library sparks Selina's imagination. Meanwhile, Jonah gets advice on how to rise in the political ranks and Dan experiences friction at work.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina helps monitor the first free and democratic election in Georgia - the country, not the state - and is reunited with an old "friend". Meanwhile, Mike and Gary hide evidence of a major mishap, and Jonah and Richard have an eventful night out.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina and her team attend the funeral of a Supreme Court Justice and Amy works on securing a location for Selina's library. Meanwhile, Dan tries to maintain his upswing with his co-host.

title: Veep
subTitle: Having settled on a location for her presidential library, Selina and Mike get to work on her book. Meanwhile, Dan lands in a gossip column.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina travels to Qatar and finds an opportunity to redeem her past blunders. Meanwhile, Jonah has a productive dinner with an old foe and Dan receives an unexpected visit.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina Meyer, an ex-senator, becomes the Vice President of the United States. Subsequently, she navigates political chaos in a sharp, satirical journey through the corridors of power.

title: Veep

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina's book finally arrives, but her legacy is almost immediately under threat by the publication of Mike's diary. Meanwhile, both Dan and Jonah experience their own troubles.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina and her team prepare for the long awaited opening of her library, which is unsurprisingly beset by complications.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina evaluates her past and present campaigns while Jonah's personal life sparks interest among the press. Later, Amy makes an important decision.

title: Veep
subTitle: At an Aspen retreat for rich donors, Selina deals with potential adversaries and allies. Meanwhile, Amy's behavior raises Gary's suspicions.

title: Veep
subTitle: In the run-up to the first debate, Selina makes a novel campaign proposal. Later, Jonah's comments create blowback while Dan and Amy take a road trip.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina and team head to South Carolina, where she seeks an endorsement from a key leader. Meanwhile, Gary gets a long-awaited promotion, while Marjorie excels in her new role.

title: Veep
subTitle: Facing increased scrutiny heading into Super Tuesday, Selina visits Mike to deflect attention from Andrew's legal troubles. Meanwhile, Jonah and Amy ramp up their anti-Selina campaign rhetoric.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina tries to arrange a meeting via her Finnish contact, Minna. Later, Gary helps Catherine plan a big event while Jonah and Amy push an anti-vaccination message in Pennsylvania.

title: Veep
subTitle: The nominating fight between Selina and her rivals reaches its climax, as their race comes to a historic finish.

subTitle: Chesapeake Shore

subTitle: While filming 'Medellin' on location in Colombia, a documentary crew captures the behind-the-scenes action. Interestingly, caught on film is tension between Billy and Eric.

subTitle: Vince and the gang return from their Italian vacation. Meanwhile, Billy avoids showing Eric and Vince the first cut of the movie.

subTitle: Stannis is just days from King's Landing and Tyrion prepares for his arrival. Jon and Qhorin are taken prisoner by the wildlings as Arya, Gendry, and Hot Pie plan to escape from Harrenhal.

subTitle: The staff question their employment at Rhijn's house, while Jack's patent is approved. Elsewhere, Peggy wins for local schools and ponders leaving NY Globe.
